violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit was taken out of service to be washed/sanitized. No ice in unit. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Inspector observed hot water lacking from handsink, bathroom, and 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Raw animal foods (such as eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as beverages and milk) in the retail cooler. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of white and pink debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC too machine out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Various sandwiches were observed held between 46-54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the back storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The small coca cola cooler located in the coffee retail area was not in good repair (ambient of 50F was observed). Establishment not to use unit for TCS foods until unit is serviced AND can maintain TCS foods at or below 41F. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old droppings, and other debris: - coffee counter area (under equipment) - retail shelves - inside cabinets under coffee area Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Inspector observed hot water lacking from hand sink in front area, bathroom, and 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The receptacle in the toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2025

The floors throughout the facility (especially under retail shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The ceiling tiles in the back storage area is in poor repair (old water damage and missing tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
The hand-washing sink in the front counter area was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

Containers of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail, walk in cooler, and the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2023
The ceilings in the back storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023

The: 1.floors in the back storage 2.walls behind the 3 bay sink 3.the 3 bay sink 4.walls and fans in the walk in cooler area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
The beverage cooler in the retail area is in poor repair(ambient temperature 47 degrees Fahrenheit). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2023
